question.text: What is the maximum investment in one investee company for large value funds of Category III AIFs?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Large value funds for accredited investors of Category III AIFs may invest up to 20% of investable funds in an Investee Company. **The Trap:** 50% is the exception for LVFs of Category I/II, not Category III. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The LVF exception doubles the standard 10% limit to 20% for Category III.
